primary_target: N-2 EEG -> AKIDA spike pipeline first run + 6 G-D selftest gates

expected_pipeline_stages.desc: synthetic 60s 16ch EEG generated (seed=20260501, alpha 10Hz + beta 20Hz + 1/f noise)

selftest_pass_criteria.pass: min dt between events on same ch >= r_steps

tension_modulated_adm_polarity_bias.rationale: anima-specific extension; tension scalar modulates polarity asymmetry of ADM encoder; hypothesis: tension_link is information bottleneck modulator in EEG->AKIDA conversion

modes.name: linear_bias
modes.formula: theta_up_eff = theta_up * (1 - alpha * tau); theta_dn_eff = theta_dn * (1 + alpha * tau)
modes.interpretation: tau > 0 (high tension) -> more UP spikes; tau < 0 (low tension) -> more DOWN spikes

modes.name: sigmoid_bias
modes.formula: bias = 0.5 * tanh(beta * tau); theta_up_eff = theta_up * (1 - bias); theta_dn_eff = theta_dn * (1 + bias)

modes.name: refractory_bias
modes.formula: r_up_eff = r * (1 + gamma * (-tau)); r_dn_eff = r * (1 + gamma * tau)

tension_modulated_adm_polarity_bias.tau_definition: z-normalized tension scalar (sliding 30s mean subtracted, std divided, clipped to [-1, +1])

d1_output_artifact: state/n_substrate_n2_prep_2026_05_01/dryrun_<TS>.json (sister state, do not overwrite from this agent)
d1_success_criterion: 6/6 G-D PASS + AKIDA forward returns non-zero output
